name: Chat App
description: A real-time AI chat application powered by LLM APIs with streaming responses, conversation history, and multi-modal support. Features include code highlighting, markdown rendering, and custom system prompts.

name: Air Writing
description: A collaborative code editor with real-time sync powered by CRDTs. Supports 20+ languages with syntax highlighting, live cursor tracking, and integrated video calling via WebRTC.

name: Swadist
description: A full-stack project management tool inspired by Notion. Drag-and-drop boards, rich text editing, nested databases, and a powerful filter & sort system. REST API consumed by a React SPA.

name: Instagram Spam Detector
description: An interactive platform to visualize 30+ sorting, pathfinding, and graph algorithms step-by-step. Built for learners — control speed, step backward, and see live complexity analysis.

name: MyKeyboard
description: A college event and community platform with user authentication, real-time notifications, geolocation-based event discovery, and an admin dashboard for event organizers.
